message:
feat: continuous backpressure severity via sigmoid + EMA (wa-1qz1.6)

Sigmoid severity function s(t) = σ(k·(q-θ)) with EMA smoothing for
natural hysteresis. Proportional throttle actions (polling backoff,
pane skip, detection skip, buffer limits). Backward-compatible tier
mapping. 32 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
